title: ILS Bhubaneshwar Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Project Associate I, Field Assistant Posts
description: The Institute of Life Sciences, Bhubaneshwar  (ILS Bhubaneshwar) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Project Associate I, Field Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 12th, DMLT, Diploma, M.Sc., M.E./M. Tech, M. Pharm can apply for the ILS Bhubaneshwar Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we ha...
